Contents 1 Introduction 2 Skills 2.1 Passive Skill: Quiet Whispers 2.2 Skill 1: Shadow Stings 2.3 Skill 2: Barren Lands 2.4 Skill 3: Death Descends 3 Splash Arts Introduction [ edit ] Sima Yi is like a walking shadow, shrouded in the darkness from head to toe, always waiting for an opportunity to strike. He comes from an illustrious anomalic family, who chose to sacrifice him in cold blood in their struggle for power. Despite spending a short time as a carefree student of the Jixia Academy, he ended up taking the solitary road of vengeance instead. Hidden by his own shadows, he has conjured a giant scythe to reap all who stand before him. Skills [ edit ] Passive Skill: Quiet Whispers [ edit ] Quiet Whispers Passive Skill Ability Type Vision Enhance Damage Magic Gains vision of casters within a range of 2000. Whenever he uses a skill, Shadow Fang activates (switch to scythe) and gains Movement Speed and deals Magical Damage . First Basic Attack after summoning the scythe dashes behind target and deal more Magical Damage . Skill 1: Shadow Stings [ edit ] Shadow Stings Skill 1 Ability Type Speed Up Immunity Damage Magic Controls an untargetable spirit , dealing damage upon contact with enemies. The main body gains crowd control immunity . When the duration ends, using another skill or a Basic Attack will cause the main body to teleport to the spirit's location. Skill 2: Barren Lands [ edit ] Barren Lands Skill 2 Ability Type Crowd Control Recovery Damage Magic Damages and silences enemies within a certain range. After a short delay, if Sima Yi is still within the skill's area, he recovers Energy. Passive: A portion of the magical damage taken is converted into Health . Skill 3: Death Descends [ edit ] Death Descends Skill 3 Ability Type Movement Damage Magic After a short delay, flies to the target direction , dealing damage to enemies at the destination and lower damage to enemies in his path. Splash Arts [ edit ] Global Chinese Show All Shadowreaper Classic Nightmare General Common Dark Magician *Megumi Fushiguro This skin is only available in Global server and will not release in China server and Japan server 九山相柳 Retrieved from " https://liquipedia.net/honorofkings/index.php?title=Sima_Yi&oldid=346279 " Categories : Characters Hero Hidden category: Pages with hard coded colors Send an email Chat with us Contact About Affiliated Sites About Privacy policy About Liquipedia Honor of Kings Wiki Disclaimers API Affiliated Sites TL.net This page was last edited on 18 November 2025, at 13:18. Contents 1 Introduction 2 Skills 2.1 Passive Skill: Ancient Wisdom 2.2 Skill 1: Corporal Punishment 2.3 Skill 2: Intuition 2.4 Skill 3: Sage's Might 3 Splash Arts 4 See Also Introduction [ edit ] When Fuzi founded Jixia Academy, he became the first of the Three Sages of Jixia, the other two being Zhuangzi and Mozi. Fuzi strongly believes that any attempt to seek wisdom or explore sorcery beyond the proper boundaries of one's knowledge will only lead to ruin. To impart knowledge in a relatively safe and controlled environment, Fuzi accepts any capable student, and teaches them according to each individual's aptitude. As a result, Fuzi's name has become like a great lantern to which the talented people of the land are drawn. Skills [ edit ] Passive Skill: Ancient Wisdom [ edit ] Ancient Wisdom Passive Skill Ability Type Enhance Cooldown Damage True After landing 5 Basic Attacks, he becomes enhanced .
While enhanced, he gains Attack Speed and Movement Speed . Each Basic Attack deals extra true damage and reduces the cooldown of Skills 1 and 2. Skill 1: Corporal Punishment [ edit ] Corporal Punishment Skill 1 Ability Type Crowd Control Slow Damage Physical Swings his ferule in the target direction, pulling enemies in its path to his location while dealing damage and slowing them. Skill 2: Intuition [ edit ] Intuition Skill 2 Ability Type Damage Reduction Enhance Slow Enhances himself. While enhanced, he reflects every enemy hero's 1st Basic Attack and slows them. Passive : Basic Attacks have a chance of turning into 2 consecutive Basic Attacks. Skill 3: Sage's Might [ edit ] Sage's Might Skill 3 Ability Type Link Movement Enfeeble Damage Physical Charges in the target direction, dealing damage to the 1st enemy hero hit and restricting their movement to a fixed area for a while.Restricted targets deal less damage . Overview Matches [ e ][ h ] Guan Yu War Saint General Information Lane: Clash Lane Roamer Role: Fighter Official HoK Global Hero Page Official HoK CN Hero Page Esports Statistics 1962 Wins : 1658 Loses (54.2%) Once you have chosen your path, you cannot waver. Contents 1 Introduction 2 Skills 2.1 Passive Skill: Rider of Triumph 2.2 Skill 1: Heroic Charge 2.3 Skill 2: Soaring Green Dragon 2.4 Skill 3: Razor Cavalry 3 Splash Arts 4 See Also Introduction [ edit ] Guan Yu possesses a strength of character that fortifies the hearts of his comrades, and a ferocity that shakes the resolve of his enemies. Boasting a sterling record from the start, he never wavers from his resolve to accomplish whatever goals he sets for himself. He values trust and abhorrs betrayal. After getting to know Liu Bei, his philosophy was further strengthened, driving him on in his pursuit of a faithful brother-in-arms. Astride his horse, Red Hare, he'll charge into the battlefield, swiftly beheading enemies right and left. Skills [ edit ] Passive Skill: Rider of Triumph [ edit ] Rider of Triumph Passive Skill Ability Type Enhance Crowd Control Damage Physical Normal Stance: Moving constantly accumulates a Movement Speed bonus, and reaching a certain distance activates the Charge Stance. Charge Stance: Enhances the next skill and Basic Attack. Skill 1: Heroic Charge [ edit ] Heroic Charge Skill 1 Ability Type Crowd Control Movement Damage Physical Normal Stance: Deals damage to enemies within range. Charge Stance: Charges forward, knocking back enemies in his path while dealing damage . Skill 2: Soaring Green Dragon [ edit ] Soaring Green Dragon Skill 2 Ability Type Cleanse Speed Up Movement Damage Physical Normal Stance: Removes crowd control effects and gains Movement Speed . Charge Stance: Removes crowd control effects and leaps forward, knocking back enemies within the landing area and dealing damage . Skill 3: Razor Cavalry [ edit ] Razor Cavalry Skill 3 Ability Type Enhance Crowd Control Damage Physical Normal Stance: Enhances himself, reducing the movement distance required to enter Charge stance. Charge Stance: Summons heavy cavalry that dash forward, dealing damage and knocking back enemies in their path. Contents 1 Profile 2 Skills 2.1 Passive Skill: Ice Queen 2.2 Skill 1: Chilling Frost 2.3 Skill 2: Diamond Dust 2.4 Skill 3: Blizzard 3 Splash Arts 4 Additional Content 4.1 WaVe: Diamond Diao Chan Solo Song - WaVe Star 5 See Also Profile [ edit ] DOB - 15 Jan; Height - 167 cm; Birth Place - Dragon Kingdom Status: Dragon Mage Info: Diao Chan is not only attractive, but is also very goal-focused and has strong execution. Diao Chan doesn't like how Norman dresses. Secret: It took a long time before Diao Chan realized that she was adopted. Diao Chan loves collecting novellas based on herself and Lu Bu. Diao Chan once snuck into a theater troupe to perform in plays written based on her own deeds. Skills [ edit ] Passive Skill: Ice Queen [ edit ] Ice Queen Passive Skill Ability Type Special Shield Damage Magic When Diao Chan exits combat, she gains a shield . The enemies attacking the shield will be slowed . If the shield is broken, it will deal damage to nearby targets. Passive: Her 3rd normal attack is enhanced, dealing additional damage . Her skills and enhanced normal attacks will slow the target. Skill 1: Chilling Frost [ edit ] Chilling Frost Skill 1 Ability Type Slow Damage Magic Diao Chan deals damage to enemies in the target area and slows them down. Skill 2: Diamond Dust [ edit ] Diamond Dust Skill 2 Ability Type Freeze Damage Magic Diao Chan deals damage to enemies in the target area and freezes them. Diao Chan deals additional damage to frozen enemies . Skill 3: Blizzard [ edit ] Blizzard Skill 3 Ability Type Area DMG Damage Magic Diao Chan deals damage to the area and slows enemies in the area. Contents 1 Introduction 2 Skills 2.1 Passive Skill: Moonlight Dance 2.2 Skill 1: Crescent Slice 2.3 Skill 2: Searing Stab 2.4 Skill 3: New Moon 3 Splash Arts Introduction [ edit ] Luna is a free-spirited warrior blessed by the moon.  Proud and resolute, she presents herself with a commanding aura. However, she has experienced her share of darkness. When she was just a young girl, Kaizer , her older brother whom she adored with all her heart, went on a rampage and slaughtered everyone in their family. He had always been kind to her, such that she could not believe he was capable of such a wicked act. Indeed, it was the curse upon their ancient clan that had driven him to act against it: Only one member of the clan could inherit its wondrous powers. She had been chosen, and he had not. Luna understood her brother's suffering and would not fight him. When she willingly offered her life to her brother's sword, he found it impossible to bring it down upon her. Now, Luna spends her time searching for her lost brother, becoming ever stronger during her journey. Skills [ edit ] Passive Skill: Moonlight Dance [ edit ] Moonlight Dance Passive Skill Ability Type Mark Enhance Damage Magic Basic Attacks have two forms, melee and ranged. First Basic Attack in melee form will charge toward the target, and third Basic Attack deals extra damage . Enhanced Basic Attacks and skill damage mark enemies. Magical Attack boost will enhance her Attack Speed. Skill 1: Crescent Slice [ edit ] Crescent Slice Skill 1 Damage Magic Unleashes a shockwave in the target direction, dealing damage and marking enemies hit. Skill 2: Searing Stab [ edit ] Searing Stab Skill 2 Ability Type Crowd Control Sheild Damage Magic Gains a sheild and pulls nearby enemies, dealing damage while stunning , slowing , and marking them. Skill 3: New Moon [ edit ] New Moon Skill 3 Ability Type Movement Cooldown Damage Magic Dashes in the target direction, dealing damage to enemies in her path. Upon hitting marked enemies, her Ultimate's cooldown will be refreshed . Contents 1 Introduction 2 Skills 2.1 Passive Skill: Sanctification 2.2 Skill 1: Divine Seal 2.3 Skill 2: Divine Punishment 2.4 Skill 3: Universal Law 3 Splash Arts Introduction [ edit ] For the good of all humanity, Ziya set out with his best friend, Fuzi, on the Journey of Divinity, and became the first of the Enforcers in the process. In the years that followed, he served as their secret leader, selecting new members at the superbeings' behest. But the good times did not last. To defeat the Dark Master, he sacrificed the greater part of his divine power, and later on, his willful nature led his disciple Wu Zetian to seal him away. However, during his captivity, he achieved enlightenment and recovered his divine power. Now, the Dark Master Diqun seeks to once more invade the mortal world. Hearing this, Ziya could not sit idly by. The ancient Sanctifier broke out of his imprisonment, determined to protect the world in his own way. Skills [ edit ] Passive Skill: Sanctification [ edit ] Sanctification Passive Skill Ability Type EXP After hitting a target, gains EXP if it is defeated within 3s. Upon reaching level 15, gains Sanctify and increases his level cap to 25. Sanctify : Increases a teammate's level cap, with a chance to earn EXP (granted). When playing as support , grants additional Sanctification effects. Skill 1: Divine Seal [ edit ] Divine Seal Skill 1 Ability Type Enfeeble Slow Damage Magic Seals enemies within range, dealing magical damage while reducing their Movement Speed, Physical and Magical Defense for 3.5s. If the skill hits any enemy, he gains a Movement Speed boost . Skill 2: Divine Punishment [ edit ] Divine Punishment Skill 2 Ability Type Crowd Control Damage Magic Conjures a magic circle that deals 3 strikes of damage to enemies in the target area. After a short delay, the magic circle explodes, dealing extra magical damage and launching enemies for 0.8s. Skill 3: Universal Law [ edit ] Universal Law Skill 3 Damage Magic Unleashes 3 shockwaves that deal magical damage . At level 15, the Ultimate's charging speed increases by 10%, and Ziya can move while charging. Contents 1 Introduction 2 Skills 2.1 Passive Skill: Royal Ambition 2.2 Skill 1: Dominator's Shield 2.3 Skill 2: Staggering Charge 2.4 Skill 3: Battlefield Command 3 Splash Arts 4 See Also Introduction [ edit ] Putting one's own interests first has always been the main principle of Liu Bang, the great conspirator. Always an outsider amongst the pious peasantfolk of the Riverlands, he was a man who truly believed that the end justifies the means. Oppressed by the ruler of his land, he devised a plan with his friend Liang to replace him: infiltrate one of the rituals of the followers of Omniscient, slay them, and devour the power from the ritual. Liu Bang firmly believes that fate is on his side, and thus his desire to rule was never going to be satisfied with just the Riverlands. Skills [ edit ] Passive Skill: Royal Ambition [ edit ] Royal Ambition Passive Skill Ability Type Enhance Damage Magic Gains 1 mark every second, for up to 4 marks. Basic Attacks expend all marks, dealing additional magical damage per mark. At maximum marks, the next Basic Attack is enhanced into a ranged attack. Skill 1: Dominator's Shield [ edit ] Dominator's Shield Skill 1 Ability Type Shield Damage Magic Grants himself a shield . If the shield is still not depleted when it expires, it will deal damage to nearby enemies. Skill 2: Staggering Charge [ edit ] Staggering Charge Skill 2 Ability Type Movement Crowd Control Damage Magic Charges up and dash forward, damaging and slowing enemies in his path. Skill 3: Battlefield Command [ edit ] Battlefield Command Skill 3 Ability Type Teleport Shield Damage Magic Provides a shield to a teammate. After a short delay, teleports to the teammate and gains Movement Speed . Contents 1 Introduction 2 Skills 2.1 Passive Skill: Killing Spear 2.2 Skill 1: Ruthless Assault 2.3 Skill 2: Fight or Die! 2.4 Skill 3: The Unrivaled Spear 3 Splash Arts 4 See Also Introduction [ edit ] Han Xin may seem compliant and cooperative, but beneath the surface, he is an unyielding strategist filled with an ambition that even rivals that of his master, Liu Bang. He has endured countless humiliations as a means to survive and achieve his goals, while silently nurturing the rage that has imprinted itself upon his heart. Han Xin pretends to be just another one of Liu Bang's subordinates, waiting for his chance to raise a storm in the Riverlands to avenge himself and return all the humiliation he has suffered a hundred-fold. Skills [ edit ] Passive Skill: Killing Spear [ edit ] Killing Spear Passive Skill Ability Type Crowd Control Enhance Recovery Every 4th Basic Attack launches the target. Hits from skills and enhanced Basic Attacks grant increased Attack Speed. Skill 1: Ruthless Assault [ edit ] Ruthless Assault Skill 1 Ability Type Movement Crowd Control Damage Physical Leaps to the target location to deal damage and launches the enemy. The second charge will not launch the enemy. Skill 2: Fight or Die! [ edit ] Fight or Die! Skill 2 Ability Type Movement Enhance Damage Physical Dashes backward and enhances the next Basic Attack to deal extra damage . If the Fight or Die! sweep is his 4th Basic Attack, it will include the 4th Basic Attack's extra effects. Skill 3: The Unrivaled Spear [ edit ] The Unrivaled Spear Skill 3 Ability Type Immunity Damage Reduction Crowd Control Damage Physical Swings spear 4 times, gaining damage reduction and crowd control immunity . Deals damage each time and launches enemies the 4th time. For the Malaysian player, see Frost (Malaysian player) . Overview Matches [ e ][ h ] Wang Zhaojun Princess Frost General Information Lane: Mid Lane Roamer Role: Mage Official HoK Global Hero Page Official HoK CN Hero Page Esports Statistics 2287 Wins : 2409 Loses (48.7%) Have the plum trees in my hometown blossomed? Contents 1 Introduction 2 Skills 2.1 Passive Skill: Frozen Heart 2.2 Skill 1: Shattered Ice 2.3 Skill 2: Frigid Prison 2.4 Skill 3: Winter is Here 3 Splash Arts 4 Additional Content 4.1 Princess Frost - Celestial Concert (CG Video) 5 See Also Introduction [ edit ] A princess from the Central Plains, Wang Zhaojun's incomparable beauty is offset by her sorrowful expression, a reflection of her homesickness for her lost hometown. 
She was sent to the Northlands under the guise of a diplomatic marriage, but was instead offered to the Ice Gods. Frozen in ice, she fell into a deep slumber. When she awoke, her hometown was no longer the same, and kneeling before her were the people of the Northlands seeking asylum. 
Though she's now the guardian of the Northlands with the ability to control the power of frost, the plum blossoms of her hometown continue to linger in her heart. Skills [ edit ] Passive Skill: Frozen Heart [ edit ] Frozen Heart Passive Skill Ability Type Sheild Slow Damage Magic Upon leaving combat, gains a sheild that chills the attacker when taking damage. When the shield disappears, deals damage to nearby enemies. Every third Basic Attack is enhanced , inflicting extra damage and chill effects. Skill 1: Shattered Ice [ edit ] Shattered Ice Skill 1 Ability Type Slow Vision Damage Magic Damage and slows enemies in the target area while gaining vision of them. Skill 2: Frigid Prison [ edit ] Frigid Prison Skill 2 Ability Type Crowd Control Slow Damage Magic After a short delay, freezes enemies in the target area and slows them. Attacking frozen targets will deal extra damage . Skill 3: Winter is Here [ edit ] Winter is Here Skill 3 Ability Type Slow Damage Magic Summons a snowstorm in the target location, constantly dealing damage and slowing enemies. Splash Arts [ edit ] *This skin was released before Global launch in Global server and isn't rerun yet. Contents 1 Introduction 2 Skills 2.1 Passive Skill: Secret Skill - Rush 2.2 Skill 1: Secret Skill - Split 2.3 Skill 2: Secret Skill - Sling 2.4 Skill 3: Secret Skill - Strike 2.5 Ultimate Skill: Secret Skill - Shadow 3 Splash Arts 4 See Also Introduction [ edit ] Originally a prince of the Golden City, he witnessed the death of his parents and the destruction of his country, after which he went from a pampered prince to a bereaved wanderer without a home. However, through harsh training, this beaten-down man became a fearsome assassin. In order to reclaim his homeland from Dunefort, he marched on the Great Wall, fully aware that it was a vainglorious endeavor. Skills [ edit ] Passive Skill: Secret Skill - Rush [ edit ] Secret Skill - Rush Passive Skill Ability Type Speed Up When an enemy is within a certain range, moving toward them will grant him increased Movement Speed . Skill 1: Secret Skill - Split [ edit ] Secret Skill - Split Skill 1 Damage Physical Deals damage to enemies within a certain range, and deals a second strike of damage to a random enemy in range. Skill 2: Secret Skill - Sling [ edit ] Secret Skill - Sling Skill 2 Ability Type Crowd Control Recovery Damage Physical Throws a dagger that damages , slows , and marks the first enemy in its path. When attacking marked targets, he stuns them and recovers Health . Marks deal grievous damage when disappearing. Skill 3: Secret Skill - Strike [ edit ] Secret Skill - Strike Skill 3 Ability Type Movement Damage Physical Exits stealth mode and dash in the target direction, dealing damage to enemies in his path. Ultimate Skill: Secret Skill - Shadow [ edit ] Secret Skill - Shadow Ultimate Skill Ability Type Stealth Speed Up Enhance Enter stealth after a short delay, increasing Movement Speed . Leaving stealth increases Attack Speed . Stealth ends if near an enemy hero for too long. (HoK) / My ideal land is always in the next place. (AoV) Contents 1 Introduction (Honor of Kings Version) 2 Profile (Arena of Valor Version) 3 Skills 3.1 Passive Skill: Elf Dance 3.2 Skill 1: Dance - Leaf Greeting 3.3 Skill 2: Twirl - Forest Whisper 3.4 Skill 3: Waltz - Laurel Bloom 4 Splash Arts Introduction (Honor of Kings Version) [ edit ] Erin is a curious and ebullient young elf princess who was born in the Luminescent Forest. Unfortunately, her position also forced her into endless insufferable rituals, dances, and a perfectly ordered life as determined by elvish custom. These restraints prompted Erin to flee the forest for the human world and her own adventure just before her coming-of-age ceremony... Profile (Arena of Valor Version) [ edit ] DOB - Unknown; Height - 165 cm; Birth Place - Unknown Status: Laurel dancer from a foreign land Info: Erin loves to discover new things. Full of curiosity, Erin danced and set off in an undecided direction. Secret: Aya feels that Erin and she can become an excellent idol combination. Erin longs for the distance, but doesn't know where she is going. Aya told Erin the story of Tel'Annas, which aroused Erin's admiration and curiosity. Skills [ edit ] Passive Skill: Elf Dance [ edit ] Elf Dance Passive Skill Ability Type Speed Up Enhance Damage Physical Her Basic Attack grants Energy. At max Energy, she speeds up , gains a stack of Laurel, and enhances her next Basic Attack. The speed-up increases with her Magical Attack. Her Pierce and Lifesteal stats are linked, using whichever is higher. Skill 1: Dance - Leaf Greeting [ edit ] Dance - Leaf Greeting Skill 1 Ability Type Slow Damage Magic Shoots a leaf to deal damage and gain marks . The leaf then forms a circle, damaging and slowing enemies. Magical Attack reduces the skill's cooldown. Skill 2: Twirl - Forest Whisper [ edit ] Twirl - Forest Whisper Skill 2 Ability Type Enhance Immunity Recovers full Energy and gains marks , immunity from slow , and Attack Speed . Skill 3: Waltz - Laurel Bloom [ edit ] Waltz - Laurel Bloom Skill 3 Ability Type Speed Up Cooldown Damage Magic This skill is unlocked when Erin gains enough Laurels. She consumes Laurels to deal damage and gain Movement Speed , while reducing the cooldown of Skill 2.
